name: spotify-related-artists
description: Get Spotify artists similar to a given artist. Use for questions like 'what artists are similar to Radiohead?', 'find artists like Bicep', 'who sounds like Pink Floyd?', 'recommend artists similar to X'. Requires a Spotify artist ID — use spotify-search first to find the artist and get their ID.

input.description: artist_id is the Spotify artist ID (required). Get the ID from spotify-search by searching for the artist by name — the id field in the artists.items array.

artist_id.description: Spotify artist ID (e.g. 4Z8W4fKeB5YxbusRsdQVPb). Get from spotify-search.

output.description: artists array of related artist objects, each with name, genres, popularity (0-100), and Spotify ID.
